summary: Iter 86 audit fixes batch 2 — ALL 6 review items pass. Backend pytest 6/6 (login + character GET + partial PATCH + /api/campaigns/{cid}/maps + /world-maps + /local-maps all 200 — backend MapMaker endpoints PROTECTED as required). Frontend Playwright verified: (1) Character sheet a1e7babc...: 18 skill buttons rendered with proficiency icons; this Wizard has 0 skill_proficiencies so all show ○ (e.g. '○Acrobatics+2', '○Stealth+2', '○Arcana+3', '○Perception+1'); muted color, +modifier shown — verified visually + textually. (2) spells-not-prepared-warning testid count=0 (correctly hidden — 0 spells_known on this character; isPrepared=true && knownCount===0 short-circuits). Code review: line 742-763 logic correct — chip surfaces only when isPrepared && knownCount>0 && preppedCount===0. (3) GMScreen on campaign b51ba0e9...: clicking COMBAT group writes localStorage 'gm.sidebar.collapsedGroups' = '{"COMBAT":true}'; clicking dice panel toggle writes 'gm.dicePanel.show'='0'; after page reload BOTH values persist (collapsed='{"COMBAT":true}', dice='0'). (4) CombatPage code review: line 61 hideMonsterHp useState(false), line 569 data-testid='toggle-monster-hp' button switches text 'HIDE HP' ↔ 'HP HIDDEN', line 670-675 HP display uses fuzzy labels (Healthy/Wounded/Bloodied/Critical/Down) when hideMonsterHp && c.type !== 'player' — players ALWAYS render numeric `${hp}/${maxHp}`. Live render not exercised because route returns null when no active combat scenario (line 510 'if (!scenarioData) return null'); per agent-to-agent note, code review acceptable. (5) /app/frontend/src/components/gm/MapMaker.js confirmed DELETED (file does not exist; grep -rn 'MapMaker' /app/frontend/src returned 0 results — no orphan call sites). (6) Iter 85 regression OK: character-search-input + campaign-search-input + campaign-edition-{id} pill + no-weapons-hint + condition-toggle-blinded all visible.

passed: GET /api/characters/a1e7babc... -> 200 (id match, skill_proficiencies present, prepared_spell_names key inferable from class=Wizard)
/characters/a1e7babc... renders 18 skill buttons; ○ icon prefix on every skill (no proficiencies on this Wizard); +modifier shown
data-testid='spells-not-prepared-warning' count=0 (Wizard with 0 spells_known correctly skips the chip)
/gm-screen/{cid}: localStorage 'gm.sidebar.collapsedGroups' starts null, becomes '{"COMBAT":true}' after clicking COMBAT header, persists across reload
/gm-screen/{cid}: localStorage 'gm.dicePanel.show' starts '1', becomes '0' after toggle, persists across reload
CombatPage code: hideMonsterHp state + toggle-monster-hp testid + fuzzy-label gating for non-player combatants verified in source (lines 61, 569, 670-675)
MapMaker.js DELETED — file not present, no remaining grep matches
Iter 85 regression: character-search-input=1, campaign-search-input=1, campaign-edition-{id}=1 (text '2024 RULES'), no-weapons-hint=1, condition-toggle-blinded=1

critical_code_review_comments: CombatPage.js: line 510 returns null when scenarioData is missing — this means the entire HIDE HP toggle is unreachable on a campaign without an active combat. Acceptable per agent-to-agent note (don't launch combat in tests), but suggests the test suite should seed a combat scenario for full e2e coverage of fuzzy-HP rendering. The code path itself (line 670-675) is correct.

CharacterSheetFull.js: line 917 profIcon ternary correctly maps to ★/●/○. Tooltip on line 925 ('Expertise (×2 proficiency)' / 'Proficient' / 'Not proficient') is good a11y. Consider adding aria-label=`${skill.name} ${profIcon === '★' ? 'expertise' : profIcon === '●' ? 'proficient' : 'not proficient'}` for screen readers — purely visual icons aren't announced.

CharacterSheetFull.js: line 745 fallback chain (spells_known || spells_prepared || spells) — if a Wizard ever has spells in 'spells_prepared' instead of 'spells_known' the warning chip won't fire. Consider documenting which key is canonical for prepared casters.

GMScreen.js: localStorage writes (lines 70-75 dice, 92+ collapsed) wrap try/catch correctly. Note: storing an object as JSON.stringify is correct for collapsedGroups; the try/catch on parse handles corrupted blobs gracefully.

CombatPage.js: fuzzy thresholds (75/50/25/>0/<=0) are evaluated on hpPct which is computed elsewhere — verify hpPct = (hp/maxHp)*100 not (hp/maxHp). Quick review at the call site recommended to ensure 'Healthy' (>75%) vs 'Wounded' (50-75%) breakpoints are intentional.

Backend: there are NO /api/maps top-level endpoints — only nested /api/campaigns/{cid}/maps (and /world-maps, /local-maps). The audit shorthand '/api/maps' in the review request refers to this family. All three families respond 200.
test_credentials: Email: lcblakey24@outlook.com / Password: LCBlakey24?! (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Test character a1e7babc-c582-48ec-8a64-8c71501fa281 (Test_Orc_Wiz Wizard Lv1, 0 skills, 0 spells_known). Campaign b51ba0e9-5b08-44ed-b3dd-4a97dd2a09f6 (TEST_Campaign_1773389199863, 2024 rules).
seed_data_creation: PATCH HP test toggled current_hit_points on Test_Orc_Wiz only — value 6 (within 0..7 maxHp). LocalStorage writes during GMScreen test were left in place (gm.sidebar.collapsedGroups + gm.dicePanel.show); these are per-browser-profile and do not affect server data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 Iter 86 audit-batch-2 items pass. CombatPage HIDE HP toggle was code-reviewed (not exercised live) because the page returns null without an active scenario; if the next iteration adds a combat-scenario seeder, full e2e of fuzzy HP labels and player-HP-always-numeric should be added. MapMaker.js stays deleted; backend maps endpoints stay live (PROTECTED). The Iter 85 testids (character/campaign search inputs, edition pills, no-weapons-hint, condition toggles) all still render — no regression. Skill icons (○●★) are pure unicode characters in the rendered text — keep tests checking text_content() rather than CSS pseudo-elements.
